# GoBhraman

> GoBhraman (गोभ्रमण) — curated group trips across India with verified stays, transparent pricing, and seamless booking. Bhraman se hi mite bhram.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Curated group trips across India.
- [Trips](/trips): Browse curated multi-day group journeys.
- [Experiences](/experiences): Short experiences and weekend getaways.
- [Destinations](/destinations): Explore India destinations from Konkan to the Himalayas.
- [Blog](/blog): Travel stories, guides, and tips.
- [Stories](/stories): Traveler stories from past journeys.
- [About](/about): Our story and mission.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with GoBhraman.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions.

## Optional

- [Cancellation Policy](/policy): Booking and cancellation terms.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle your data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Platform usage terms.
